text: Receiving  the  Meritus  Scholarship  for  Academic  Excellence  is  truly  an  honor  for  me.  My  journey  through  the  first  year  has  been  transformational.  Academic  rigor,  the  structured  curriculum  and  case -based  discussions  really  push  me  to  think  deeper  and  sharpen  my  analytical  abilities.  A  big  part  of  this  achievement  goes  to  our  exceptional  faculty.  This  their  guidance,  real  insights  and  constant  encouragement  helped  me  correct,  correct  the  theory  with  practice  in  every  course.

segments.text: Receiving the Meritus Scholarship for Academic Excellence is truly an honor for me.
My journey through the first year has been transformational.
Academic rigor, the structured curriculum and case-based discussions really push me to think deeper
and sharpen my analytical abilities. A big part of this achievement goes to our
exceptional faculty. This their guidance, real insights and constant
encouragement helped me correct, correct the theory with practice in every course.
